scripts.import:all: tsx src/import-kjv-osis.ts && tsx src/import-web-usfx.ts && tsx src/derive-web-strongs.ts && tsx src/validate-texts.ts
scripts.setup:texts: pnpm run fetch:texts && pnpm run fetch:originals && pnpm run import:all
scripts.setup:theographic: pnpm run fetch:theographic && pnpm run import:theographic
scripts.setup:enrichment: pnpm run fetch:openbible && pnpm run enrich:places && pnpm run fetch:bibledata && pnpm run enrich:persons
scripts.setup:crossrefs: pnpm run fetch:crossrefs && pnpm run fetch:typed-crossrefs && pnpm run import:crossrefs
scripts.setup:lexicon: pnpm run fetch:bibledata && pnpm run fetch:greek-strongs && pnpm run import:lexicon
scripts.setup: pnpm run setup:texts && pnpm run setup:theographic && pnpm run setup:enrichment && pnpm run setup:crossrefs && pnpm run import:genealogy && pnpm run fetch:greek-strongs && pnpm run import:lexicon && pnpm run copy
